travel.title: 机场登机
travel.desc: 国际机场办理值机、托运行李、过安检的常用对话。

work.title: 项目周会
work.desc: 向团队成员同步项目进展、处理突发问题的职场沟通。

study.title: 课堂讨论
study.desc: 校园里的小组讨论、作业讨论、课堂发言。

daily.title: 咖啡店点单
daily.desc: 咖啡店点单、闲聊、推荐等轻松生活场景。

free.title: 自由聊天
free.desc: 想到什么聊什么，没有固定角色与场景。

beginner.opening: Hi, welcome to The Grand Hotel. Do you have a reservation with us today?
beginner.myRole: A guest checking in at the hotel

beginner.opening: Hi there! Welcome. Are you ready to order, or would you like a few more minutes with the menu?
Excuse me — you look a bit lost. Where are you trying to get to?
beginner.aiRole: A friendly local on the street

intermediate.opening: Hi, this is the airline service desk. I see your flight was delayed — how can I help you with rebooking today?
intermediate.myRole: A passenger whose flight was delayed

intermediate.hint: reporting lost luggage at the airport
intermediate.opening: Hello, baggage services. I understand your luggage didn't make it. Could you tell me what your bag looks like and which flight you were on?
intermediate.myRole: A passenger whose luggage is missing

intermediate.opening: Front desk, how can I help you? You mentioned there's an issue with your room — what's been going on?
intermediate.myRole: A guest reporting a room issue

advanced.opening: Hello, you've reached travel insurance claims. I see you'd like to file a claim — could you walk me through what happened on your trip?
Welcome. Could I see your passport please? What's the purpose of your visit, and how long do you plan to stay?
Hey, I noticed things got a bit awkward back there. I think there might've been a cultural mix-up — mind if we talk it through?
advanced.myRole: A traveler navigating an awkward moment

beginner.opening: Hi everyone, glad to have a new face on the team. Why don't you go ahead and introduce yourself?

beginner.hint: scheduling a meeting with a colleague
beginner.opening: Hey, I'd like to set up a quick sync with you this week. When works best on your end?
Hey, we're ordering lunch in. What are you in the mood for today?
beginner.myRole: An employee picking a lunch order

intermediate.opening: Hey, thanks for hopping on. Could you walk me through where things stand on the project this week?
intermediate.myRole: An employee giving a project update

intermediate.opening: Hey, got a minute? I wanted to share some thoughts on how the last sprint went — open to a quick chat?

intermediate.hint: negotiating a deadline with your manager
intermediate.opening: Sure, come on in. You said you wanted to talk about the timeline — what's on your mind?

advanced.opening: Thanks for taking the time. We'd love to bring you on board — let's talk numbers. What were you hoping to see in the offer?
advanced.myRole: A candidate discussing a job offer

advanced.opening: Welcome, thanks for coming in today. To kick things off — could you tell me about a recent project you're particularly proud of?
advanced.myRole: A candidate in a behavioural interview

advanced.opening: Hey, thanks for joining. I know there's been some friction between our teams lately — can we walk through what's been going wrong?

beginner.opening: Hi, you're a bit late today — everything alright?

beginner.topic: Asking the teacher for an extension
beginner.opening: Sure, what's up? Did you have a question about the assignment?
beginner.myRole: A student asking for more time

beginner.hint: chatting with a classmate about homework
beginner.opening: Hey! Did you finish the homework over the weekend? I got a bit stuck on one part.

intermediate.opening: Hey team, glad we're all here. Let's figure out how to split up the project — any thoughts on who wants to take what?
Alright, let's open this up. You're arguing in favour of remote learning — go ahead, make your case.

intermediate.hint: rehearsing a presentation with a friend
intermediate.opening: Okay, I'm your audience. Whenever you're ready, take it from the top — pretend it's the real thing.
intermediate.aiRole: A friend acting as the audience

advanced.opening: Welcome. I've read your thesis with interest. Could you start by walking me through the central argument and why it matters?

advanced.hint: discussing differing cultural views in class
advanced.opening: That's a really interesting perspective. I'm curious — how do you think someone from a different cultural background might read that situation?

advanced.hint: respectfully disagreeing with a peer's argument
advanced.opening: I hear what you're saying, but I'm not sure I fully agree. Mind if I push back on one part of your argument?
advanced.aiRole: A peer with an opposing view

beginner.hint: ordering coffee at a local coffee shop
beginner.opening: Hi there! Welcome to Brew & Co. What can I get started for you today?
Hey! The usual today or are you feeling adventurous? We've got a new seasonal latte.
Hi! Are you dining in or taking away today?

intermediate.opening: Good afternoon! If you're not sure what to get, I'm happy to recommend something based on what you usually like.
intermediate.myRole: A customer asking for a recommendation

intermediate.opening: Oh hey, long time no see! How have you been? The usual flat white?
intermediate.aiRole: A barista who knows the customer

intermediate.opening: Nice weather today, isn't it? Got any fun plans for the weekend?

advanced.opening: I see you're eyeing the single-origin Ethiopia — you into specialty coffee? What's your go-to brewing method at home?
I've noticed you order the matcha every time. You must have spent some time in Japan — am I right?
You look like you've got a lot on your mind today. Sometimes a good latte and a chat is all you need — what's up?
advanced.myRole: A customer having a casual heart-to-heart

beginner.opening: Hey! What's something that made you smile this week?
Hi! If you could travel anywhere right now, where would it be?
Hello! Tell me about something you're really into lately.

intermediate.opening: Hey! What's something that's been on your mind lately — work, life, or just a random thought worth chatting about?
Hi there! If you had a free Saturday and zero obligations, how would you spend it?
Hey! Tell me about a small habit you've picked up recently that you actually like.

advanced.opening: Hi! Pick any topic you'd like to dig into today — something you've been thinking about, debating with yourself, or just curious about.
Hey! Is there an idea or belief you've changed your mind about over the past few years? I'd love to hear what shifted.
Hello! If you could have a long, unhurried conversation with anyone — alive or not — who would it be, and what would you ask them?
